Delay.name: Delay
Delay.description: Pause execution for a specified duration

Delay Until.name: Delay Until
Delay Until.description: Pause execution until a specific datetime

Wait For Condition.name: Wait For Condition
Wait For Condition.description: Wait until a condition is true or timeout

Comment.name: Comment
Comment.description: Add a comment to the process (does nothing at runtime)

Log Message.name: Log Message
Log Message.description: Log a message at the specified level

Elapsed Time.name: Elapsed Time
Elapsed Time.description: Calculate elapsed time from a start timestamp

Measure Duration.name: Measure Duration
Measure Duration.description: Get detailed duration from a start timestamp
